title: Tefkir Name. - Suleika (Speaks).
content:
The mirror tells me, I am fair!

    Thou sayest, to grow old my fate will be.
    Nought in God's presence changeth e'er,

    Love him, for this one moment, then, in me.
meaning:
Johann Wolfgang von Goethe's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Tefkir Name. - Suleika (Speaks)."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
